bullets: Completed industrial attachment in the Mechanical Maintenance department, gaining hands-on exposure across seven key sections.
Rotary Maintenance and Condition Monitoring (RMCM): Predictive maintenance and equipment reliability monitoring.
Ammonia Maintenance: High-pressure system maintenance and safety protocols.
Urea and Granulation Maintenance: Production equipment maintenance and troubleshooting.
Utility Maintenance: Supporting infrastructure and auxiliary systems.
Mechanical Workshop: Precision machining, fabrication, and repair operations.
MES Maintenance: Mobile equipment and heavy machinery maintenance.
Developed practical skills in preventive maintenance planning, equipment troubleshooting, cross-functional coordination, and industrial safety protocols.
Tasked with driving the preliminary sourcing strategy for JawFit's hard Xylitol jaw-training gum.
Laid the groundwork for a secure, cost-effective supply chain through strategic supplier identification and evaluation.
Conducted sourcing and procurement activities to support product development.
